data.content: Implementation review rejected: the code under review still does not implement a first-class knot acceptance field. The storage model remains body/description-only, there is no --acceptance CLI support, no knot.acceptance_set event kind, and sync/rehydration still only project description. This repository also does not contain the foolery knots-backend/toBeat/addNote implementation named in the knot description, so that required backend migration could not be reviewed here. make sanity passes, but the feature is incomplete against the knot description and acceptance criteria.
